succ_correct.solution:
Proof.
  induction p; simpl; try lia.
  rewrite IHp. lia.
Qed.
succ_correct.explanation: By induction on p. The xI case uses the IH; the xO and xH cases are direct.

addc_correct.solution:
Proof.
  induction p; destruct q; destruct c; simpl;
  try rewrite IHp; try rewrite succ_correct; try lia.
Qed.
addc_correct.explanation: By induction on p with case analysis on q and c. Rewrite with IH and succ_correct, then lia handles arithmetic.

compare_correct.solution:
Fixpoint compare x y {struct x} :=
  match x, y with
  | p~1, q~1 => compare p q
  | p~1, q~0 => match compare p q with Lt => Lt | _ => Gt end
  | p~1, xH => Gt
  | p~0, q~1 => match compare p q with Gt => Gt | _ => Lt end
  | p~0, q~0 => compare p q
  | p~0, xH => Lt
  | xH, q~1 => Lt
  | xH, q~0 => Lt
  | xH, xH => Eq
  end.

Theorem compare_correct:
 forall x y,
  match compare x y with
  | Lt => positive2nat x < positive2nat y
  | Eq => positive2nat x = positive2nat y
  | Gt => positive2nat x > positive2nat y
 end.
Proof.
  induction x; destruct y; simpl;
  try (specialize (IHx y); destruct (compare x y); lia);
  try (pose proof (positive2nat_pos x); lia);
  try (pose proof (positive2nat_pos y); lia);
  try lia.
Qed.
compare_correct.explanation: Complete the compare function with all 9 cases, then prove correctness by induction on x with destruct on y, using IH and positive2nat_pos.

successor_of_Z_constant_time.explanation: The successor function does a carry from low-order to high-order bits, stopping at the first 0 bit. For a random number, the probability of k consecutive 1 bits at the low end is 1/2^k, so the expected number of carry operations is sum(k/2^k) = 2, which is constant.

look_leaf.solution:
Proof.
  intros. destruct j; reflexivity.
Qed.
look_leaf.explanation: By case analysis on j. In all cases (xI, xO, xH), look on a Leaf returns the default.

look_ins_same.solution:
Proof.
  induction k; destruct t; simpl; auto.
Qed.
look_ins_same.explanation: By induction on k with case analysis on t. The recursive cases follow from the IH.

look_ins_other.explanation: By induction on j with case analysis on k and t. Uses look_leaf and the IH with congruence to handle the j <> k condition.

pos2nat_injective.solution:
Proof.
  intros.
  rewrite <- (pos2nat2pos p).
  rewrite <- (pos2nat2pos q).
  rewrite H. reflexivity.
Qed.
pos2nat_injective.explanation: Use pos2nat2pos to convert back from nat to positive, then rewrite with the hypothesis.

nat2pos_injective.solution:
Proof.
  intros.
  rewrite <- (nat2pos2nat i).
  rewrite <- (nat2pos2nat j).
  rewrite H. reflexivity.
Qed.
nat2pos_injective.explanation: Use nat2pos2nat to convert back from positive to nat, then rewrite with the hypothesis.

is_trie.solution: Definition is_trie {A: Type} (t: trie_table A) : Prop := True.
is_trie.explanation: The simplest representation invariant: all trie tables are well-formed. This suffices because the trie operations always produce valid structures.

empty_is_trie.explanation: Since is_trie is True, this is trivial.

insert_is_trie.explanation: Since is_trie is True, this is trivial.

empty_relate.solution:
Proof.
  intros. unfold Abs, abstract, lookup, empty. simpl.
  extensionality n. unfold t_empty.
  rewrite look_leaf. reflexivity.
Qed.
empty_relate.explanation: Unfold definitions, use extensionality, and apply look_leaf to show all lookups return the default.

lookup_relate.solution:
Proof.
  intros. unfold Abs, abstract in H0.
  rewrite <- H0. unfold lookup.
  rewrite pos2nat2pos. reflexivity.
Qed.
lookup_relate.explanation: Unfold the Abs relation, use pos2nat2pos to convert between positive and nat representations.

insert_relate.solution:
Proof.
  intros. unfold Abs, abstract in *.
  extensionality n.
  unfold lookup, insert, t_update.
  bdestruct (pos2nat k =? n).
  - subst. rewrite pos2nat2pos. simpl.
    rewrite look_ins_same. reflexivity.
  - rewrite <- H0. unfold lookup.
    rewrite pos2nat2pos. simpl.
    rewrite look_ins_other.
    + reflexivity.
    + intro. subst. apply H1. apply nat2pos_injective in H2.
      rewrite nat2pos2nat in H2. auto.
      Restart.
  intros. unfold Abs, abstract in *.
  extensionality n.
  unfold lookup, insert, t_update.
  bdestruct (pos2nat k =? n).
  - subst. rewrite pos2nat2pos. simpl.
    rewrite look_ins_same. reflexivity.
  - rewrite pos2nat2pos. simpl.
    rewrite look_ins_other.
    + rewrite <- H0. unfold lookup. rewrite pos2nat2pos. reflexivity.
    + intro. subst. apply H1. apply pos2nat_injective. rewrite nat2pos2nat. reflexivity.
Qed.
insert_relate.explanation: Use extensionality, then case split on pos2nat k =? n. The same-key case uses look_ins_same; the different-key case uses look_ins_other with pos2nat_injective.

Abs_three_ten.solution:
Proof.
  apply insert_relate. exact I.
  apply insert_relate. exact I.
  apply empty_relate.
Qed.
Abs_three_ten.explanation: Chain insert_relate twice with empty_relate, using I for the trivial is_trie proofs.

pos2nat_bijective.solution:
Lemma pos2nat_injective: forall p q, pos2nat p = pos2nat q -> p=q.
Proof.
  intros p q H.
  rewrite <- (pos2nat2pos p). rewrite <- (pos2nat2pos q).
  rewrite H. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma nat2pos_injective: forall i j, nat2pos i = nat2pos j -> i=j.
Proof.
  intros i j H.
  rewrite <- (nat2pos2nat i). rewrite <- (nat2pos2nat j).
  rewrite H. reflexivity.
Qed.
